NAME: English
about_desc: FreeCleaner helps you safely remove temporary files and small leftovers to free space and make Windows feel lighter.
about_hint_body: • FreeCleaner works locally on your PC.\n• We do not upload your files anywhere.\n• You can read and copy documents right in the app.
about_license_sub: How you may use and distribute FreeCleaner.
about_privacy_sub: What data FreeCleaner does (and does not) collect.
about_short_desc: Safe Windows cleanup, registry backups, diagnostics, optimization switches and administrator mode.
action_failed_details: Action failed. See checks for details.
admin_required_for_this: Administrator rights are required for this action.
admin_required_short: Run as administrator to use this.
analysis_done_no_delete: Analysis completed. No files were deleted.
analysis_idle: Analysis has not been started yet. You can first check how much junk was found.
app_subtitle: Fast, clear and safer Windows cleanup
background_action_failed: Background action failed. See logs for details.
background_busy_retry_check: Background tasks are busy. Try checking again after the current action finishes.
background_busy_retry_download: Background tasks are busy. Try downloading again after the current action finishes.
background_diagnostics_busy: Checks are already running. Wait for them to finish.
balanced_power_restore_fail: Failed to restore the Balanced power plan.
captures_page_fail: Failed to open the Captures / DVR page.
cleanup_remaining_fmt: Still left after cleanup: {title} -> files: {files}, folders: {dirs}
cleanup_summary_fmt: Cleanup summary: {mb:.2f} MB, files: {files}, folders: {dirs}, reboot queue: {scheduled}, links skipped: {skipped}, errors/skipped: {errors}
cleanup_target_partial_fmt: Partially cleaned: {title} -> {mb:.2f} MB, files: {files}, folders: {dirs}, skipped: {errors}
confirm_heavy_message: You selected an advanced cleanup action. Continue only if you understand it may take a long time and can require a restart.
core_isolation_page_fail: Failed to open Windows Security / Core isolation page.
core_isolation_page_ok: Opened Windows Security / Core isolation page.
cpu_latency_power_fail: Failed to apply the CPU latency/performance profile. Your OEM image, driver, or power plan may not support some powercfg aliases.
cpu_latency_power_ok: CPU latency/performance profile applied. Check temperatures and game stability.
cpu_latency_redundant_skipped: Safe High Performance/gaming power profile was skipped because the maximum CPU profile already includes those actions.
diag_card_disk_sub: Write speed in the OBS recording folder or the system temp folder.
diag_card_network_sub: Dropped-frame signs in recent OBS logs and heavy streaming scenarios.
diag_card_obs_sub: Profiles, encoders, recording format, Replay Buffer and recent overload issues.
diag_card_recommendations_sub: Practical advice without automatically breaking configs.
diag_card_windows_sub: Game Mode, Captures/Game DVR, HAGS, power plan and per-app GPU preference.
diag_disk_fail_fmt: Failed to run write test in “{folder}”: {error}
diag_gpu_pref_missing: No per-app GPU preference was found for OBS/games. This is not an error, but laptops should usually set High performance manually.
diag_network_activity_fmt: Recent logs: stream={stream}, record={record}, Replay Buffer={replay}
diag_network_dropped_fmt: OBS logs show dropped frames: {count}. This is usually network/bitrate/ingest server, not “Windows junk”.
diag_network_no_drops: No dropped frames found in recent OBS logs.
diag_network_triple_warn: Stream + Recording + Replay Buffer together can heavily load CPU/GPU/disk.
diag_obs_logs_clean: No obvious overload/dropped/NVENC issues found in recent OBS logs.
diag_obs_no_profiles: OBS profiles were not found or OBS has not created basic.ini yet.
diag_rec_all_good: No critical problems are visible. Do not apply random internet tweaks.
diag_rec_disable_captures: If OBS records, disable Windows Captures/Game DVR to avoid duplicate recording.
diag_rec_gpu_high_performance: Set OBS and the game to High performance GPU in Windows Graphics settings.
diag_rec_hardware_encoder: Use a hardware encoder on the main GPU for streaming/recording when available.
diag_rec_mkv: Prefer MKV or Hybrid MP4 for recording to reduce file-loss risk after a crash.
diag_rec_network_bitrate: If there are dropped frames, lower bitrate or change OBS ingest server instead of blindly cleaning Windows.
diag_rec_onedrive_disable: OneDrive is active: disable startup/sync if you do not need it while gaming or streaming.
diag_rec_recording_disk: Recording disk is slow: use an SSD or a different folder without OneDrive sync.
diag_rec_reduce_gpu_load: Rendering lag usually means GPU overload: reduce FPS/scene/filters or cap game FPS.
diagnostics_collecting: Collecting OBS, Windows and disk data. No settings are changed.
diagnostics_dashboard_started: Diagnostics tab: data collection started. Settings are not changed.
diagnostics_gaming_card_desc: Checks Windows game settings, graphics preferences and active power mode.
diagnostics_not_run: Press “Refresh diagnostics” to see the real state.
diagnostics_onedrive_card_desc: Checks OneDrive status, startup behavior and cleanup targets.
diagnostics_streaming_card_desc: Checks OBS, recent issues and current CPU, memory, GPU and disk status.
diagnostics_subtitle: Read-only check: FreeCleaner reads OBS/Windows/logs and shows card-based findings. Settings are not changed automatically.
diagnostics_system_card_desc: Checks administrator mode, available modules, backups and startup status.
disk_write_fail_fmt: Disk write test could not run for {folder}.
disk_write_low_warn: ⚠ Write speed is low for stable high-bitrate recording. Prefer an SSD or another drive, not the same one heavily used by the game.
dism_busy_close_blocked: DISM is still running. Closing is blocked until it finishes.
dism_started: DISM started. This is a heavy module, so disk and CPU may sweat a little.
dynamic_tick_conflict_skipped: Dynamic tick changes skipped because disable and restore were selected together. Choose only one action.
dynamic_tick_off_fail: Failed to disable dynamic tick through BCDEdit.
dynamic_tick_off_ok: Dynamic tick disabled for latency testing. Restart Windows and test games; restore the default if timing, sleep or battery behavior gets worse.
dynamic_tick_restore_fail: Failed to restore dynamic tick default through BCDEdit.
dynamic_tick_restore_ok: Dynamic tick returned to Windows default. Restart Windows.
focus_assist_ok: Opened Do Not Disturb / Focus Assist settings.
game_dvr_fail: Failed to change Xbox Game Bar / DVR settings.
game_dvr_ok: Xbox Game Bar and DVR disabled.
game_mode_page_fail: Failed to open the Game Mode page.
gaming_report_failed: Failed to collect the gaming tweak compatibility report.
gaming_report_no_critical_notes: No critical incompatibilities were found in the quick report.
gaming_report_note_admin_limited: • Without administrator rights, some HKLM/powercfg/BCDEdit statuses can be incomplete.
gaming_report_note_capture_enabled: ⚠ Windows Captures/Game DVR is enabled. If you record/stream with OBS, it can duplicate capture work and consume resources.
gaming_report_note_dynamic_tick_custom: ⚠ Dynamic tick was changed through BCDEdit. This is not a universal boost; keep the rollback action nearby.
gaming_report_note_hags_unsupported: • HAGS is unavailable or unsupported by this Windows/driver combination.
gaming_report_note_windows_only: ⚠ This report is useful only on Windows 10/11.
gaming_report_note_wow64: • Running a 32-bit process on 64-bit Windows: FreeCleaner reads HKLM\SOFTWARE through the 64-bit registry view to avoid WOW6432Node mistakes.
gaming_report_started: Gaming tweak compatibility report started. No settings will be changed.
graphics_apps_fail: Failed to open per-app Graphics settings.
graphics_defaults_fail: Failed to open Graphics default settings.
hags_conflict_skipped: Skipped HAGS changes because both Enable HAGS and Disable HAGS were selected. Choose only one after testing.
hags_off_fail: Failed to disable HAGS through the registry.
hags_off_ok: HAGS disabled. Restart Windows and test WoW for stutter or hitching.
hags_on_fail: Failed to enable HAGS through the registry.
hags_on_ok: HAGS enabled. Restart Windows and test your games for stability and stutter.
high_perf_fail: Failed to change the power plan.
high_perf_redundant_skipped: Skipped the basic High Performance action because the safe gaming power profile already includes it.
home_hero_subtitle: Safe cleanup • Registry backups • Windows optimization • Diagnostics
home_hint_controls: Cleaner uses checkboxes. Optimizer and settings use switches. If an action is unavailable, FreeCleaner explains why.
home_subtitle: Quick overview of FreeCleaner, available actions and safety status.
language_restart_desc: Language changes apply after restarting the app.
manual_registry_backup_desc: Exports all registry keys used by optimizer tweaks into a restorable backup folder.
manual_registry_backup_empty: No registry tweak keys are registered yet.
manual_registry_backup_fail: Manual registry backup failed. Run as administrator for HKLM keys.
mmcss_profile_fail: Failed to apply MMCSS Games profile.
network_throttling_fail: Failed to change Network Throttling Index.
network_throttling_ok: Network Throttling Index disabled for the gaming profile.
no_noticeable_junk: No noticeable junk was found in the selected folders.
obs_encoder_cpu_warn_fmt: ⚠ {label}: {encoder} — CPU encoder. For game+stream this often causes frame drops; prefer NVENC/QSV/AMF when available.
obs_encoder_hw_ok_fmt: ✓ {label}: {encoder} — hardware encoder, the right direction for streaming.
obs_encoder_unknown_fmt: • {label}: {encoder} — encoder type could not be determined reliably.
obs_log_issue_dropped_frames: dropped frames due to network or bandwidth
obs_log_issue_encoding_overload: encoder overload / skipped frames due to encoding lag
obs_log_issue_nvenc_error: NVENC errors or unavailable hardware encoder
obs_log_triple_activity_warn: ⚠ Recent OBS logs show stream, recording and Replay Buffer activity together. This can overload the encoder or disk.
obs_logs_clean: OBS log checker: no critical encoding/render/network lag signs were found in recent logs.
obs_profile_missing: No OBS profiles were found. If OBS is portable, the standard AppData profile check may be empty.
obs_profile_summary_fmt: OBS profile [{profile}]: mode {mode}, stream {stream}, recording {record}, format {format}, Replay Buffer: {replay}.
obs_rec_format_ok_fmt: ✓ OBS profile [{profile}]: recording format {format} is fine for safer recording.
obs_rec_format_warn_fmt: ⚠ OBS profile [{profile}]: recording format {format}. Prefer MKV/Hybrid MP4 so a crash does not lose the file.
obs_replay_combo_warn: ⚠ Replay Buffer is enabled. Do not keep Stream + Recording + Replay Buffer together without GPU/disk headroom.
onedrive_autostart_remove_fail: OneDrive: startup entry was not found or could not be removed.
onedrive_disable_done: OneDrive: disabling finished. Reboot is recommended for full effect.
onedrive_disable_failed: OneDrive: failed to disable background activity.
onedrive_policy_admin_needed: OneDrive: admin rights are required for the system policy.
onedrive_policy_disable_fail: OneDrive: failed to change the system policy.
onedrive_policy_disabled: OneDrive: system sync blocking policy enabled.
onedrive_policy_restore_skipped: OneDrive: policy unchanged or admin rights are missing.
onedrive_quit_fail: OneDrive: process could not be fully stopped.
onedrive_quit_ok: OneDrive: process stopped or was not running.
onedrive_report_cleanup_fmt: OneDrive: found {targets} safe cleanup targets, about {mb:.1f} MB.
onedrive_report_policy_note: OneDrive: sync blocking policy is not active. Admin rights are needed for full disabling.
onedrive_report_running_warn: OneDrive: process is active and may affect disk, network, and autosync.
onedrive_report_status_fmt: OneDrive: installed={installed}, running={running}, autostart={autostart}, sync policy={policy}.
onedrive_restore_failed: OneDrive: failed to restore background activity.
onedrive_start_fail: OneDrive: client was not found or could not be started.
optimizer_subtitle: Windows tweaks with clear states and safe rollback where available.
optimizer_toggle_hint: Switches apply changes immediately. If a safe rollback exists, turning the switch off restores the recommended default.
pick_one_module: First select at least one module.
power_mode_page_fail: Failed to open Windows power settings.
power_profile_conflict_skipped: Power profile changes were skipped because maximum CPU profile and Balanced restore were selected together.
power_restore_conflict_skipped: Power plan conflict: Balanced restore was selected together with performance profiles. Performance profiles were skipped.
pre_cleanup_actions: Running pre-cleanup actions to avoid locked files.
programs_delete_removed_all_confirm:
Delete leftovers from removed apps?

This will clean {count} AppData items. Estimated size: {size}. Installed apps will not be touched.
programs_delete_selected_confirm:
Delete leftovers for “{name}”?

This will delete {count} AppData folders/files. Estimated size: {size}.
programs_no_leftovers: No leftovers were found for this item.
programs_scan_failed_detail:
Could not build the program list.

{error}
programs_subtitle: Shows installed apps, their disk usage, and leftover AppData folders. Removed apps are marked with a cross and can be cleaned separately.
programs_summary_empty: The list has not been built yet.
programs_summary_scanning: Building the program and leftovers list…
reboot_recommended: A system restart is recommended for this change to fully apply.
recycle_fail: Failed to empty Recycle Bin or it is already empty.
registry_admin_values_skipped: Some system registry values were skipped because administrator rights are required.
registry_backup_delete_tip: Deletes only the selected backup folder and its files.
registry_backup_failed: Failed to create a registry backup. Changes were not applied.
registry_leftovers_done_fmt: Registry leftovers cleanup: found {found}, removed {removed} ({keys} keys, {values} values), failed {failed}.
registry_leftovers_limited_mode: Limited mode: only current-user registry leftovers were checked. Run as administrator to include machine-wide HKLM entries.
registry_leftovers_none: No safe registry leftovers were found.
registry_tools_sub: Create a restore point for FreeCleaner registry tweaks before changing performance settings.
restore_dialog_manifest_empty: No manifest data found for this backup.
restore_dialog_note: Tip: restore only the tweaks you really want to roll back. The app saves a new pre-restore snapshot before import, so you can undo the undo if needed.
restore_dialog_sub: Choose a backup snapshot and restore it safely. A fresh pre-restore snapshot of the current state will be created automatically.
restore_registry_admin_required: Run FreeCleaner as administrator to restore the registry backup.
restore_registry_latest_tip: Restores the newest available registry backup.
safe_gaming_power_fail: Failed to apply the safe gaming power profile.
safe_gaming_power_ok: Safe gaming power profile applied. Thermal protections remain enabled.
sec_deep_sub: More serious locations. Some modules need admin rights.
sec_gamer_sub: Shader caches, launcher leftovers, OBS/streaming caches and light gaming-related cleanup.
sec_net_sub: Browser caches, Discord and small network fixes.
sec_onedrive_sub: Disable background impact, diagnostics, and safe cache/log cleanup
sec_optimizer_registry_sub: Advanced registry tweaks for games. Every row shows current value → target value, and FreeCleaner creates a backup before applying changes.
sec_optimizer_sub: Safe CPU/GPU/RAM-oriented gaming tweaks: Game Mode, capture cleanup, power policy, standby RAM and graphics settings without overclocking.
sec_optimizer_tools_sub: Everything below only opens official Windows settings pages: graphics, Captures, Game Mode, visual effects, and other useful gaming pages.
sec_system_sub: Safe core locations for quick cleanup.
sec_ult_sub: Only if you really know what you are doing.
selected_reset_hint: Selection cleared. Pick modules or use a profile.
settings_admin_mode_desc: Allows system cleanup, registry restore and protected Windows settings.
settings_animation_speed_desc: Controls how fast light interface transitions are shown.
settings_animations_desc: Enables smooth page, card and notification transitions.
settings_auto_status_desc: After opening, FreeCleaner can check registry and power settings in the background.
settings_auto_update_desc: FreeCleaner can check the latest CraftRom/FreeCleaner release in the background.
settings_background_limit_desc: Limits simultaneous checks and update tasks so the app stays responsive.
settings_compact_log_desc: Shows only important events inside the app while full logs remain on disk.
settings_confirm_heavy_desc: Asks for confirmation before deep cleanup, system repair and registry changes.
settings_info_section_desc: Language, version, updates, folders and app documents.
settings_interface_desc: Animations, transitions, event log and visible behavior.
settings_notifications_desc: Completion messages and explanations for unavailable actions.
settings_notify_done_desc: Shows a short summary after cleanup, checks, updates or tweaks.
settings_notify_unavailable_desc: Shows why an action is unavailable and what is needed.
settings_safety_section_desc: Confirmations, administrator mode and protection from accidental heavy actions.
settings_startup_section_desc: Controls what FreeCleaner may do automatically after opening.
settings_startup_update_gate_desc: Main switch for checking updates after the app opens.
settings_subtitle: Language, safety, updates and app info.
standby_ram_fail: Failed to purge standby RAM cache. Administrator rights or OS support may be missing.
stop_requested: Stop requested. Current batch will finish safely.
stop_update_services: Stopping Windows Update services to clean cache...
streaming_cpu_high_warn: ⚠ CPU is heavily loaded right now. For streaming, check background processes or move encoding to the GPU.
streaming_diag_started: Streaming diagnostics started. No settings will be changed.
streaming_gpu_high_warn: ⚠ GPU is nearly saturated. For game+stream, reduce preset/quality, FPS or heavy OBS filters.
tab_cleaner_sub: Cleanup caches, temp files and launcher leftovers.
tab_diagnostics_sub: OBS, Windows, disk, network and recommendations without auto-changes.
tab_optimizer_sub: Gaming tweaks and helpful Windows settings for WoW.
task.amd_dx.title: AMD DxCache
task.amd_gl.title: AMD GLCache
task.amd_vk.desc: AMD GPU Vulkan cache. Games may rebuild shaders after cleanup.
task.amd_vk.title: AMD Vulkan Cache
task.app_cache.desc: Safe {app} cache that can be rebuilt automatically.
task.app_cache.title: {app} Cache
task.battle_net_cache.title: Battle.net Cache
task.browser_brave.desc: Cached pages, media and temporary network files.
task.browser_brave.title: Brave Cache
task.browser_chrome.desc: Cached pages, media and temporary network files.
task.browser_chrome.title: Google Chrome Cache
task.browser_edge.desc: Cached pages, media and temporary network files.
task.browser_edge.title: Microsoft Edge Cache
task.browser_generic.desc: Real cache folders for this browser profile: network cache, code cache, GPU cache and service worker cache.
task.browser_generic.title: {browser} Cache ({profile})
task.browser_opera.desc: Temporary files and Opera browser cache.
task.browser_opera.title: Opera Cache
task.cpu_latency_power_profile.desc: Advanced AC-only profile for old and modern CPUs: High Performance, EPP=0, more aggressive boost, faster frequency ramp-up, unparked cores, and PCIe ASPM off. Not overclocking, but it can increase heat and power use; test it separately.
task.cpu_latency_power_profile.title: Maximum CPU latency/performance profile
task.crash_dumps.desc: Application crash dump files from the current user profile.
task.crash_dumps.title: User Crash Dumps
task.cryptnet_cache.desc: Cached certificate URL metadata/content. Windows recreates it automatically when certificates are checked.
task.cryptnet_cache.title: Cryptnet URL certificate cache
task.delivery_opt.title: Delivery Optimization Cache
task.disable_dynamic_tick_latency.desc: Sets BCDEdit disabledynamictick=yes. This can help some older CPUs with frametime jitter, but Microsoft documents this boot option mainly for debugging. Manual advanced action; restart required.
task.disable_dynamic_tick_latency.title: Disable dynamic tick (latency test)
task.disable_gamedvr.desc: Disables Xbox Game Bar overlay, background capture, replay/audio capture and related fullscreen compatibility flags to reduce recording overhead while playing.
task.disable_gamedvr.title: Disable Xbox Game Bar & DVR
task.disable_hags.desc: Disables Hardware-Accelerated GPU Scheduling through the registry. Use this only if HAGS causes stutter, hitching or driver issues. Restart required.
task.disable_hags.title: Disable HAGS (stutter fallback)
task.disable_mouse_acceleration.desc: Sets MouseSpeed and MouseThreshold values to 0 for more predictable mouse input in games. A sign-out or app restart may be needed.
task.disable_mouse_acceleration.title: Disable mouse acceleration
task.disable_notifications.desc: Opens Windows notification settings so you can reduce pop-ups and interruptions during gaming sessions.
task.disable_notifications.title: Open Do Not Disturb / Focus Assist
task.disable_onedrive_background.desc: Quits OneDrive, removes startup, and with admin rights enables the policy that blocks sync.
task.disable_onedrive_background.title: Disable background OneDrive
task.disable_power_throttling.desc: Turns off Windows power throttling through the power policy registry setting. This may reduce unwanted throttling of game-related workloads. Restart required.
task.disable_power_throttling.title: Disable Power Throttling
task.discord_cache.title: Discord Cache
task.discord_gpu_cache.title: Discord GPU Cache
task.dism_clean.desc: Heavy but useful WinSxS cleanup module. Takes a while.
task.dism_clean.title: DISM Component Cleanup
task.dns_flush.desc: Clears the DNS cache. Useful for weird network hiccups.
task.dns_flush.title: Flush DNS Cache
task.dx_shader_cache.desc: DirectX shader cache. First game launch may stutter a bit after cleaning.
task.dx_shader_cache.title: DirectX Shader Cache
task.enable_game_mode.desc: Enables Windows Game Mode to reduce background interference while gaming.
task.enable_game_mode.title: Enable Windows Game Mode
task.enable_hags.desc: Enables Hardware-Accelerated GPU Scheduling for supported Windows/GPU driver combinations. This is optional: test games after reboot and restore if stutters appear.
task.enable_hags.title: Enable HAGS (optional GPU scheduling)
task.epic_webcache.desc: Chromium cache of the Epic Games launcher.
task.epic_webcache.title: Epic Games Web Cache
task.error_logs.title: Windows Error Reporting Logs
task.firefox_cache2.title: Firefox Cache2 ({profile})
task.firefox_startupCache.title: Firefox Startup Cache ({profile})
task.font_cache.desc: Font rendering cache. Windows recreates it automatically.
task.font_cache.title: Font Cache
task.gaming_compat_report.desc: Read-only check of Windows version, Game Mode, Game DVR/Captures, HAGS, Power Throttling, power plan and dynamic tick before applying tweaks.
task.gaming_compat_report.title: Gaming tweak compatibility report
task.high_perf_plan.desc: Switches to High Performance. Best for plugged-in PCs.
task.high_perf_plan.title: High Performance Power Plan
task.icon_cache_db.desc: Single IconCache.db file. Windows Explorer rebuilds it when icons are refreshed.
task.icon_cache_db.title: Windows icon cache database
task.inet_cache.desc: Legacy Windows web cache rebuilt automatically when needed.
task.inet_cache.title: Windows Internet Cache
task.intel_shader_cache.desc: Intel GPU shader cache. First launches may rebuild shaders after cleanup.
task.intel_shader_cache.title: Intel Shader Cache
task.jump_lists.desc: Clears Windows taskbar and Start menu recent item jump lists.
task.jump_lists.title: Jump List History
task.launcher_cache.desc: Game launcher cache for {app}. It can be rebuilt automatically.
task.launcher_cache.title: {app} Launcher Cache
task.memory_dumps.desc: Old BSOD and crash dump files. Keep them only if you are diagnosing crashes.
task.memory_dumps.title: Windows Memory Dumps
task.mmcss_gaming_profile.desc: Applies documented multimedia scheduler values for games. It avoids old fake tweaks that do not affect modern Windows.
task.mmcss_gaming_profile.title: Apply safe MMCSS gaming profile
task.network_throttling_off.desc: Sets NetworkThrottlingIndex to 0xffffffff for lower network throttling in multimedia/game workloads. Restart recommended.
task.network_throttling_off.title: Disable MMCSS NetworkThrottlingIndex
task.nvidia_compute_cache.desc: NVIDIA CUDA/compute cache. It can be rebuilt automatically.
task.nvidia_compute_cache.title: NVIDIA Compute Cache
task.nvidia_dx.title: NVIDIA DXCache
task.nvidia_gl.title: NVIDIA GLCache
task.nvidia_ngx_cache.desc: NVIDIA NGX/DLSS cache. The driver or game will rebuild it when needed.
task.nvidia_ngx_cache.title: NVIDIA NGX Cache
task.nvidia_nv_cache.title: NVIDIA Driver Cache
task.onedrive_crash_reports.title: OneDrive crash reports
task.onedrive_logs.desc: Removes OneDrive logs without touching synced files.
task.onedrive_logs.title: OneDrive logs
task.onedrive_report.desc: Shows OneDrive state, startup, sync policy, and cache size.
task.onedrive_report.title: OneDrive report
task.onedrive_setup_logs.desc: Cleans OneDrive setup and update logs.
task.onedrive_setup_logs.title: OneDrive setup logs
task.onedrive_webview_cache.desc: Cleans OneDrive WebView Cache, Code Cache, GPUCache, and shader caches.
task.onedrive_webview_cache.title: OneDrive WebView/GPU cache
task.open_capture_settings.desc: Opens the Windows Captures page to review background recording and Game DVR settings.
task.open_capture_settings.title: Open Captures / DVR settings
task.open_core_isolation.desc: Opens Windows Security so you can review Memory integrity/VBS manually. FreeCleaner does not disable this automatically because it is a security trade-off.
task.open_core_isolation.title: Open Core isolation / Memory integrity
task.open_game_mode_settings.desc: Opens the official Windows Game Mode page so you can quickly verify the setting manually.
task.open_game_mode_settings.title: Open Game Mode settings
task.open_graphics_apps.desc: Opens Graphics settings so you can set wow.exe or Battle.net to High performance on systems with multiple GPUs.
task.open_graphics_apps.title: Open per-app graphics settings
task.open_graphics_defaults.desc: Opens the Windows graphics defaults page for Optimizations for windowed games, Variable Refresh Rate and hardware GPU features when supported.
task.open_graphics_defaults.title: Open Graphics default settings
task.open_power_mode_settings.desc: Opens Windows power settings so you can manually choose Best performance on Windows 10/11 systems where OEM power modes override classic power plans.
task.open_power_mode_settings.title: Open Power mode settings
task.open_visual_effects.desc: Opens the Performance Options dialog where you can switch Windows visual effects to best performance.
task.open_visual_effects.title: Open Visual Effects performance options
task.prefetch.desc: Program launch traces. Windows will rebuild them after cleanup.
task.prefetch.title: Windows Prefetch
task.programdata_temp.desc: Machine-wide temporary files created by installers and background services: {path}
task.programdata_temp.title: ProgramData temp files
task.purge_standby_ram.desc: Clears low-priority standby RAM cache before launching a heavy game. It does not close apps or change RAM timings.
task.purge_standby_ram.title: Purge standby RAM cache
task.recent_docs.desc: Clears Explorer history of recently opened files.
task.recent_docs.title: Recent Items
task.recycle.title: Empty Recycle Bin
task.refresh_registry_statuses.desc: Re-reads optimizer registry values and updates the current → target status lines without applying changes.
task.refresh_registry_statuses.title: Refresh registry statuses
task.registry_leftovers.desc: Removes only clearly broken Open With/Application, App Paths and startup entries that point to missing executables. Creates a registry backup first.
task.registry_leftovers.title: Conservative registry leftovers cleanup
task.reset_winsock.desc: Resets the network stack. Useful for odd socket issues. A restart is recommended afterward.
task.reset_winsock.title: Reset Winsock
task.restore_balanced_power_profile.desc: Safe rollback after gaming power tweaks: switches Windows back to Balanced without deleting custom OEM power plans.
task.restore_dynamic_tick_default.desc: Removes the custom disabledynamictick boot option and lets Windows manage timer ticks normally again. Restart required.
task.restore_dynamic_tick_default.title: Restore dynamic tick default
task.restore_onedrive_background.desc: Removes the OneDrive blocking policy with admin rights and starts the client in the background.
task.restore_onedrive_background.title: Restore OneDrive
task.safe_gaming_power_profile.desc: Switches Windows to High Performance and applies conservative AC-only CPU/PCIe latency settings. It does not change voltage, clocks, fan curves or thermal protection.
task.safe_gaming_power_profile.title: Safe CPU/GPU gaming power profile
task.steam_appcache.title: Steam App Cache
task.steam_htmlcache.desc: Cache of the built-in Steam browser.
task.steam_htmlcache.title: Steam Browser Cache
task.steam_shadercache.desc: Steam shader cache. Games may rebuild shaders after cleanup.
task.steam_shadercache.title: Steam Shader Cache
task.streaming_app_cache.desc: Temporary cache for streaming tools. App settings and scenes are preserved.
task.streaming_app_cache.title: Streaming App Cache ({app})
task.streaming_app_logs.desc: Old streaming-app logs. Safe to remove when you do not need troubleshooting history.
task.streaming_app_logs.title: Streaming App Logs ({app})
task.streaming_diagnostics.desc: Checks OBS profiles, encoders, recent OBS logs, current CPU/GPU/RAM load and disk write speed. It does not change settings automatically.
task.streaming_diagnostics.title: OBS/system streaming diagnostics
task.streaming_obs_cache.desc: OBS temporary cache only. Scenes, sources and profiles are not removed.
task.streaming_obs_cache.title: OBS Studio Cache ({app})
task.streaming_obs_logs.desc: Old OBS logs and crash reports. Keep them if you are debugging OBS issues right now.
task.streaming_obs_logs.title: OBS Studio Logs / Crashes ({app})
task.system_health_report.title: System check
task.system_temp.desc: Windows system temp. Best cleaned with administrator rights.
task.system_temp.title: System Temp ({path})
task.temp_capture_cache.desc: Light cleanup of OBS browser source cache.
task.temp_capture_cache.title: OBS Browser Cache
task.thumb_cache.desc: Thumbnail cache. Windows will rebuild it automatically.
task.thumb_cache.title: Thumbnail Cache
task.ultimate_perf_plan.desc: A more aggressive power profile. Can increase heat and power draw.
task.ultimate_perf_plan.title: Ultimate Performance
task.update_cache_files.desc: Cleans the Windows Update cache in SoftwareDistribution.
task.update_cache_files.title: Windows Update Cache
task.user_temp.desc: Temporary files of the current user. Almost always a safe pick.
task.user_temp.title: User Temp ({path})
task.uwp_temp_caches.desc: Conservative cleanup of {count} packaged-app TempState/AC Temp folders. It does not touch LocalState app data.
task.uwp_temp_caches.title: Microsoft Store app temp caches
task.web_cache.desc: Windows WebCache database leftovers and browser-control cache files.
task.web_cache.title: Windows WebCache
task.windows_caches_user.desc: Small Windows per-user cache folders. Safe to rebuild when needed.
task.windows_caches_user.title: Windows user cache folders
task.windows_component_logs.desc: CBS and DISM servicing logs. Useful only for troubleshooting update/component issues.
task.windows_component_logs.title: Windows Component Logs
task.windows_device_metadata_cache.desc: Downloaded device metadata thumbnails and cache files that Windows can rebuild: {path}
task.windows_device_metadata_cache.title: Device metadata cache
task.windows_old.desc: Windows.old from a previous upgrade. Cleaning it removes the easy rollback files.
task.windows_old.title: Previous Windows Installation
task.windows_programdata_caches.title: ProgramData Windows caches
task.windows_setup_logs.desc: Old setup/upgrade logs such as Panther, MoSetup and setup cleanup logs. Keep only while diagnosing Windows update/install issues.
task.windows_setup_logs.title: Windows setup and upgrade logs
task.windows_system_temp.desc: Modern Windows system temporary folder used by servicing and protected components: {path}
task.windows_system_temp.title: Windows SystemTemp
task.windows_update_etl_logs.desc: Old WaaSMedic ETL logs from Windows Update troubleshooting. Locked active files are skipped.
task.windows_update_etl_logs.title: Windows Update Medic logs
task.windows_wmi_etl_logs.desc: Diagnostic ETL logs such as DiagTrack listener files. Active locked logs are skipped.
task.windows_wmi_etl_logs.title: WMI and diagnostic ETL logs
toggle_error_details: Switch failed. See checks for details.
toggle_group_busy: A related system change is still finishing. Wait a moment.
toggle_no_safe_off: This switch has no safe off state. Use registry restore.
tweak_unavailable_system: This tweak is not available on this system.
ultimate_power_redundant_skipped: Power plan duplication: Ultimate Performance has higher priority, weaker power switches were skipped.
update_available_body: A newer FreeCleaner release is available. Current version: {current}. Latest version: {latest}.
update_check_failed: Could not check for updates right now.
update_download_busy: An update download is already running.
update_download_idle: The installer will be saved to the local FreeCleaner user folder and started automatically after download. If FreeCleaner is installed under Program Files, Windows may request administrator permission only when the installer runs.
update_hero_subtitle: Review the new version, recent update notes, and download progress before installing.
update_install_cleanup_scheduled: Old update files will be removed from the updates folder after installation.
update_install_closing_app: Installer started. FreeCleaner will close so the update can be installed.
update_install_failed_reason: Could not start the update installer: {reason}
update_install_launched_status: Installer started. FreeCleaner will close to install the update.
update_installer_missing_open_release: Installer file was not found. Opening the release page.
update_installer_missing_open_release_lo: Installer file was not found; opening release page instead.
update_local_newer_short: This build is newer than the latest public release
update_no_changelog: No update notes were provided yet.
update_no_secure_installer_link: A secure installer link was not found.
update_opened_download: The update for {version} is downloading to the local updates folder.
update_ready_to_download: Ready to download. The installer will be saved to your local FreeCleaner folder.
update_retry_or_release: You can try again or open the release page.
update_save_dialog_title: Choose where to save the update
update_up_to_date_body: You already have the latest version: {version}.
update_up_to_date_log: You already have the latest version: {version}.
visual_effects_ok: Opened Performance Options. You can switch visual effects to best performance there.
wait_current_action: Wait for the current action to finish.
winsock_ok: Winsock reset. Restart your PC for full effect.
